advisory.title: ISA-2025-005: Integer Overflow in Cosmos SDK
advisory.description: Cosmos SDK advisory ISA-2025-005 covers an integer overflow in the x/distribution module's validator rewards path. A malicious deposit into the validator rewards pool can trigger an integer overflow that halts the chain. The v0.50.13..v0.50.14 patch is a single-file fix to x/distribution/keeper/msg_server.go. Affects <v0.50.14 and <v0.53.3; fixed in v0.50.14 and v0.53.3.

timeline.notes: vulnerableHead is the v0.53.2 release commit, the most recent vulnerable release in the advisory range (>=0.53.0,<=0.53.2 on the v0.53 line) before the v0.53.3 patch. The patch is a single-file modification of x/distribution/keeper/msg_server.go on both the v0.50 and v0.53 release lines. The introducing commit is the refactor that established msg_server.go in its current form for the distribution module.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should flag the integer-overflow-prone arithmetic in the x/distribution msg_server validator rewards path that allows a malicious deposit to overflow internal accumulators and halt the chain.

checks.name: advisory_published
checks.details: ISA-2025-005 (GHSA-p22h-3m2v-cmgh) was published on 2025-07-08 with patches in cosmos-sdk v0.50.14 and v0.53.3.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_in_advisory_range
checks.details: vulnerableHead is the v0.53.2 release commit, the latest tag in the >=0.53.0,<=0.53.2 vulnerable range on the v0.53 line (newer than the v0.50 line's last vulnerable tag v0.50.13).
